text: Today we are ranking Banana as a fruit, per 100g, so you can see where it really lands.
fat is 0.3g. omega 3 is absurdly strong.
carbs is 22.8g. fibre is seriously strong.
protein is 1.1g. the absorption case is very strong.
vitamin c at 10% DV, vitamin a at 1% DV stand out most.
potassium at 8% DV, magnesium at 7% DV stand out most.
biggest pros: very practical everyday fruit. often easy to tolerate. brings a useful potassium identity.
biggest cons: sugar load is fairly high. fibre is only modest. glycemic behaviour is only middling.
Yeah, this is B tier. Banana lands at 32 overall.
